   676	      # If secure upload is enabled we need to first set the access control post of
   677	      # all post uploads (even uploads that are linked to multiple posts). If the
   678	      # upload is not set to secure upload then this has no other effect on the upload,
   679	      # but we _must_ know what the access control post is because the should_secure_uploads?
   680	      # method is on the post, and this knows about the category security & PM status
   681	      update_uploads_access_control_post if SiteSetting.secure_uploads?
   682	
   683	      puts "", "Analysing which uploads need to be marked secure and be rebaked.", ""
   684	      if SiteSetting.login_required? && !SiteSetting.secure_uploads_pm_only?
   685	        # Simply mark all uploads linked to posts secure if login_required because
   686	        # no anons will be able to access them; however if secure_uploads_pm_only is
   687	        # true then login_required will not mark other uploads secure.
   688	        puts "",
   689	             "Site is login_required, and secure_uploads_pm_only is false. Continuing with strategy to mark all post uploads as secure.",
   690	             ""
   691	        post_ids_to_rebake, all_upload_ids_changed = mark_all_as_secure_login_required
   692	      else
   693	        # Otherwise only mark uploads linked to posts either:

   695	        #   * In PMs if SiteSetting.secure_uploads_pm_only
   696	        puts "",
   697	             "Site is not login_required. Continuing with normal strategy to mark uploads in secure contexts as secure.",
   698	             ""
   699	        post_ids_to_rebake, all_upload_ids_changed =
   700	          update_specific_upload_security_no_login_required
   701	      end

   707	    # This is done asynchronously by changing the baked_version to NULL on
   708	    # affected posts and relying on Post.rebake_old in the PeriodicalUpdates
   709	    # job. To speed this up, these levers can be adjusted:

     3	# This script runs a revision to remove upload and attachment markup that are attached to posts that have been deleted.
     4	# This automation is intended to be used with clean_up_uploads job.
     5	# On the next clean_up_uploads job, uploads that are no longer referenced in any post will be deleted from the system.
     6	
     7	DiscourseAutomation::Scriptable.add(
     8	  DiscourseAutomation::Scripts::REMOVE_UPLOAD_MARKUP_FROM_DELETED_POSTS,
     9	) do
    10	  version 1
    11	
    12	  triggerables %i[recurring point_in_time]
    13	
    14	  script do |trigger, fields|
    15	    uploads_removed_at = Time.now
    16	    edit_reason =
    17	      I18n.t("discourse_automation.scriptables.remove_upload_markup_from_deleted_posts.edit_reason")
    18	
    19	    # it matches:
    20	    #  ![alt|size](upload://key)
    21	    #  [small.pdf|attachment](upload://key.pdf) (Number Bytes)
    22	    #  ![](upload://key.png)
    23	    upload_and_attachment_regex =
    24	      %r{!?\[([^\]|]*)(?:\|[^\]]*)?\]\(upload://([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)[^)]*\)(?:\s*\([^)]*\))?}
    25	
    26	    Post
    27	      .with_deleted
    28	      .where.not(deleted_at: nil)
    29	      .joins(:upload_references)
    30	      .where("upload_references.target_type = 'Post'")
    31	      .joins(
    32	        "LEFT JOIN post_custom_fields ON posts.id = post_custom_fields.post_id AND post_custom_fields.name = 'uploads_removed_at'",
    33	      )
    34	      .where("post_custom_fields.post_id IS NULL")
    35	      .where(
    36	        "NOT EXISTS (
    37	          SELECT 1 FROM reviewables
    38	          WHERE reviewables.target_id = posts.id
    39	          AND reviewables.target_type = 'Post'
    40	          AND reviewables.status = ?
    41	        )",
    42	        Reviewable.statuses[:pending],
    43	      )
    44	      .distinct
    45	      .limit(DiscourseAutomation::REMOVE_UPLOAD_MARKUP_FROM_DELETED_POSTS_BATCH_SIZE)
    46	      .each do |post|
    47	        if updated_raw = post.raw.gsub!(upload_and_attachment_regex, "")
    48	          topic =
    49	            if post.topic.nil?
    50	              Topic.with_deleted.find_by_id(post.topic_id)
    51	            else
    52	              post.topic
    53	            end
    54	
    55	          if ok =
    56	               PostRevisor.new(post, topic).revise!(
    57	                 Discourse.system_user,
    58	                 { raw: updated_raw, edit_reason: edit_reason },
    59	                 { force_new_version: true, skip_validations: true },
    60	               )
    61	            post.custom_fields["uploads_removed_at"] = uploads_removed_at
    62	            post.save_custom_fields
    63	          end
    64	        end
    65	      end
    66	  end
    67	end

1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Jobs
     4	  class CleanUpUploads < ::Jobs::Scheduled
     5	    every 1.hour
     6	
     7	    def execute(args)
     8	      grace_period = [SiteSetting.clean_orphan_uploads_grace_period_hours, 1].max
     9	
    10	      # Always remove invalid upload records regardless of clean_up_uploads setting.
    11	      Upload
    12	        .by_users
    13	        .where(
    14	          "retain_hours IS NULL OR created_at < current_timestamp - interval '1 hour' * retain_hours",
    15	        )
    16	        .where("created_at < ?", grace_period.hour.ago)
    17	        .where(url: "")
    18	        .find_each(&:destroy!)
    19	
    20	      return unless SiteSetting.clean_up_uploads?
    21	
    22	      # Do nothing if the last cleanup was run too recently.
    23	      last_cleanup_timestamp = last_cleanup
    24	      if last_cleanup_timestamp.present? &&
    25	           (Time.zone.now.to_i - last_cleanup_timestamp) < (grace_period / 2).hours
    26	        return
    27	      end
    28	
    29	      result = Upload.by_users
    30	      Upload.unused_callbacks&.each { |handler| result = handler.call(result) }
    31	
    32	      # 1. Exclude uploads that have retain_hours set and are still within that retention period.
    33	      # 2. Exclude uploads created in the grace period.
    34	      # 3. Exclude secure uploads that have an access_control_post_id.
    35	      # 4. Exclude uploads that are link to an upload reference.
    36	      # 5. Exclude uploads that are linked to anything but a Post via UploadReference.
    37	      result =
    38	        result
    39	          .where(
    40	            "uploads.retain_hours IS NULL OR uploads.created_at < current_timestamp - interval '1 hour' * uploads.retain_hours",
    41	          )
    42	          .where("uploads.created_at < ?", grace_period.hour.ago)
    43	          .where(
    44	            "((uploads.access_control_post_id IS NULL) OR (uploads.access_control_post_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT uploads.secure))",
    45	          )
    46	          .joins("LEFT JOIN upload_references ON upload_references.upload_id = uploads.id")
    47	          .where("upload_references.upload_id IS NULL")
    48	          .with_no_non_post_relations
    49	
    50	      result.find_each do |upload|
    51	        next if Upload.in_use_callbacks&.any? { |callback| callback.call(upload) }
    52	        upload.sha1.present? ? upload.destroy : upload.delete
    53	      end
    54	
    55	      ExternalUploadStub.cleanup!
    56	
    57	      self.last_cleanup = Time.zone.now.to_i
    58	    end
    59	
    60	    def last_cleanup=(timestamp)
    61	      Discourse.redis.setex(last_cleanup_key, 7.days.to_i, timestamp.to_s)
    62	    end
    63	
    64	    def last_cleanup
    65	      timestamp = Discourse.redis.get(last_cleanup_key)
    66	      timestamp ? timestamp.to_i : timestamp
    67	    end
    68	
    69	    def reset_last_cleanup!
    70	      Discourse.redis.del(last_cleanup_key)

     3	module Jobs
     4	  class MigrateUploadScheme < ::Jobs::Scheduled
     5	    every 10.minutes
     6	    sidekiq_options retry: false
     7	
     8	    def execute(args)
     9	      return unless SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme
    10	
    11	      # clean up failed uploads
    12	      Upload
    13	        .where("created_at < ?", 1.hour.ago)
    14	        .where("LENGTH(COALESCE(url, '')) = 0")
    15	        .find_each { |upload| upload.destroy! }
    16	
    17	      # migrate uploads to new scheme
    18	      problems = Upload.migrate_to_new_scheme(limit: 50)
    19	
    20	      problems.each do |hash|
    21	        upload_id = hash[:upload].id
    22	        Discourse.handle_job_exception(
    23	          hash[:ex],
    24	          error_context(args, "Migrating upload id #{upload_id}", upload_id: upload_id),
    25	        )
    26	      end
    27	
    28	      # clean up failed optimized images
    29	      OptimizedImage
    30	        .where("LENGTH(COALESCE(url, '')) = 0")
    31	        .find_each { |optimized_image| optimized_image.destroy! }
    32	
    33	      # Clean up orphan optimized images
    34	      OptimizedImage
    35	        .joins("LEFT JOIN uploads ON optimized_images.upload_id = uploads.id")
    36	        .where("uploads.id IS NULL")
    37	        .find_each { |optimized_image| optimized_image.destroy! }
    38	
    39	      # Clean up optimized images that needs to be regenerated
    40	      OptimizedImage

     3	module Jobs
     4	  class UpdateAnimatedUploads < ::Jobs::Scheduled
     5	    every 1.hour
     6	
     7	    MAX_PROCESSED_GIF_IMAGES = 200
     8	
     9	    def execute(args)
    10	      Upload
    11	        .where("extension = 'gif' OR (extension IS NULL AND original_filename LIKE '%.gif')")
    12	        .where(animated: nil)
    13	        .limit(MAX_PROCESSED_GIF_IMAGES)
    14	        .each do |upload|
    15	          uri = Discourse.store.path_for(upload) || upload.url
    16	          upload.animated = FastImage.animated?(uri)
    17	          upload.save(validate: false)
    18	          upload.optimized_images.destroy_all if upload.animated
    19	        end
    20	
    21	      nil
    22	    end
    23	  end
    24	end
